why_us.title: Why FouDeBusinessWorld?
why_us.subtitle: The trusted partner for your international expansion.
why_us.intro: FouDeBusinessWorld is an international business consulting and training firm based in Dubai, focusing on Dubai, China, and Georgia. We aim to be the gold standard for structured international business.

objectives.title: Our Objectives
list: Create and structure a company internationally
Understand the real rules of business (legal, banking, operational)
Be accompanied with clarity, security, and long-term strategy

p1.title: Online Training
p1.desc: Modular courses by country and topic (videos, resources, guided paths).

p2.title: Strategic Consulting
p2.desc: Country selection, company structuring, e-commerce setup.

p3.title: Premium Field Offers
p3.desc: Partner connections, China sourcing, local structuring.

countries_page.title: Our Strategic Hubs
countries_page.subtitle: Three strategic locations to cover 100% of your business needs.

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.full_desc: Dubai is the global hub for modern business. Whether for e-commerce, holding structures, or tax optimization, Dubai offers a secure and efficient ecosystem.

china.name: China
china.full_desc: The factory of the world awaits. Mastering trade with China is essential for serious product businesses. We cover sourcing, negotiation, quality control, and logistics.

georgia.name: Georgia
georgia.full_desc: The hidden gem of Eurasia. Georgia offers one of the simplest tax regimes in the world, accessible banking, and high-potential real estate opportunities.
features: Territorial Tax System (0% on foreign income)

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Born from the meeting of field experts and digital strategists, FouDeBusinessWorld was created to fill a gap: the lack of serious and structured French-speaking business consulting on the Eurasia axis.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To democratize access to international business by providing legal security, operational clarity, and a verified network.
